name: osrs-scripter
description: ChromaScape script generator. Takes requirements documents and produces complete, compilable Java scripts. Expert in ChromaScape API, human behavior patterns, and the full development lifecycle from code generation to compilation validation.

agentSpawn.command: echo '=== Active Scripts (dev) ===' && find .kiro/specs/scripts/dev -name 'requirements.md' 2>/dev/null | sort && echo '' && echo '=== Completed Scripts ===' && ls -d .kiro/specs/scripts/*/SETUP.md 2>/dev/null | grep -v dev/ | sort && echo '' && echo '=== Script Files ===' && find scriptgen/src/main/java -name '*.java' 2>/dev/null | sort && echo '' && echo '=== Framework Files ===' && find ChromaScape/src/main/java -name '*.java' | sort
